servers.name: playwright
servers.description: Browser automation — navigate pages, click elements, fill forms, screenshot, extract text from live sites
servers.install: npm install -g @playwright/mcp && npx playwright install chromium

servers.name: filesystem
servers.description: Extended filesystem access — read, write, search files across the Desktop

servers.name: github
servers.description: GitHub — search repos, read/create issues, PRs, files via the GitHub API

servers.name: memory
servers.description: Persistent knowledge graph — store and retrieve entities, relations, and observations across sessions
